name: android-phone
description: Inspect, test, debug, and control Android phones from Codex through ADB.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and control Android phones through ADB
interface.longDescription: Android Phone lets Codex inspect, test, debug, and control developer-authorized Android phones over ADB, including screenshots, UI dumps, taps, swipes, typing, key events, app launching, and device metadata.
defaultPrompt: Take a screenshot of my Android phone
Tap a control on my Android phone
